title: Custody Gaps
description: Review Bitcoin that may have remained under the same legal owner while passing through wallet history that is not imported into Kassiber.

summary.unquantified_one: {{count}} additional blocking issue has no exact quantity.
summary.unquantified_other: {{count}} additional blocking issues have no exact quantity.

coverage.title: Imported wallet policy timeline
coverage.description: Technical scan coverage for wallet policies imported into Kassiber. Kassiber cannot know whether every wallet owned by this profile's legal owner was imported.
coverage.technicalOnly: This coverage can improve diagnostics, but it never clears a custody gap, proves complete wallet coverage, or confirms an external disposal.
coverage.unavailable: Recorded technical coverage is unavailable. This does not change custody-gap status.
coverage.empty: No imported policy coverage has been recorded yet. This does not mean that no owned wallets exist.
coverage.notObserved: No completed scan recorded for this branch
coverage.noBranches: No derivation-branch coverage has been recorded.
coverage.noSources: No observer source coverage has been recorded for this epoch.

lineage.title: Custody lineage
lineage.description: Finalized same-owner wallet moves from the canonical custody model. Custody finality and tax-basis readiness are shown separately.
lineage.unavailable: Canonical custody lineage is unavailable until the journal has been processed.
lineage.empty: No finalized internal wallet moves have been recorded yet.
lineage.basisBlocked: Custody is settled, but tax basis remains blocked by an earlier unresolved custody boundary.

evidence.recordedFanout: Exact outputs from one recorded chain transaction

reviewQueue.title: Possible missing-wallet returns
reviewQueue.description: Suggestions are deterministic and never create a custody bridge automatically. Time reduces confidence but does not hide a plausible long-term return.

history.title: Reviewed custody history
history.description: Decisions remain visible. Dismissals apply only to the evidence fingerprint that was reviewed.

reviewHistory.title: Append-only review history
reviewHistory.unavailable: Review history is unavailable. No correction can be confirmed while its preview is unavailable.
reviewHistory.empty: No review decision has been recorded for this candidate yet.
reviewHistory.reportImpacts_one: This decision recorded {{count}} saved or filed report impact.
reviewHistory.reportImpacts_other: This decision recorded {{count}} saved or filed report impacts.

review.missing: This custody gap no longer exists.
review.explicitReview: Kassiber cannot know that every wallet was imported. A bridge is created only after a successful local preview and your explicit approval.
review.correctionPath: Need to correct this decision? Create a new immutable component revision and activate it. Kassiber will supersede the prior bridge without rewriting its audit history.

actions.previewAmounts: Carry {{retained}}; keep {{residual}} in custody suspense; preserve {{fee}} as the known fee.
actions.reviewWarnings: Facts that still require your judgment
actions.explicitOwnershipConfirmation: I reviewed these exact amounts and competing explanations. I confirm the retained quantity remained under this profile's legal owner's control. Kassiber is not inferring this for me.
actions.dismissConfirm: Dismiss this candidate for its current evidence? Changed evidence will reopen it.

correction.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you reopening or revising this reviewed bridge?

reopen.title: Correct this reviewed bridge
reopen.description: Reopen the current bridge first. Kassiber will supersede it without deleting its evidence or review history.
reopen.revision: Current immutable component revision: {{current}}. It will be superseded, not deleted.
reopen.confirmation: I reviewed this preview and want to reopen this exact bridge for correction. I understand reports remain blocked until I activate a revised bridge.

revise.title: Activate the corrected bridge
revise.description: This reopened bridge must be revised inside its existing immutable lineage. Kassiber will not create an unrelated replacement.
revise.revision: Component revision {{current}} will be superseded by revision {{next}} in the same lineage.
revise.amounts: The revision carries {{retained}} and leaves {{residual}} for a separate residual decision.
revise.confirmation: I reviewed these exact revised amounts and confirm this revision represents the legal owner's retained custody.

residual.title: Resolve the remaining custody quantity
residual.description: Classify the exact residual {{amount}} through a guided custody decision.
residual.reasonPlaceholder: Record the evidence or judgment behind this residual decision.
residual.taxBoundary: This step decides custody only. Country-specific tax treatment remains a separate review and Kassiber does not infer it from this label.
residual.taxMeaningUnassigned: Not assigned by this custody action.
residual.giftLossTaxReview: Gift and loss labels still require country-specific tax review before final reporting.
residual.confirmation: I reviewed this exact residual quantity and confirm the selected custody outcome. I understand this does not assign country-specific tax treatment.

custodyState.external_confirmed: The reviewed quantity leaves this legal owner's custody.
custodyState.internal_reviewed: The reviewed quantity remains under this legal owner's custody.
custodyState.custody_suspense: The reviewed quantity remains in custody suspense and continues to block final basis.

external_payment.label: External payment
external_payment.description: The quantity left the legal owner's custody as a payment; tax meaning is still separate.

external_disposal.label: External disposal
external_disposal.description: The quantity left the legal owner's custody in a reviewed disposal; country-tax treatment is still separate.

external_gift.label: External gift
external_gift.description: The quantity left the legal owner's custody as a gift; country-specific tax review is still required.

external_loss.label: External loss
external_loss.description: Control of the quantity was lost; country-specific tax review is still required.

retained_custody.label: Retained custody
retained_custody.description: The quantity remained under the same legal owner's control despite the missing wallet history.

suspense_continuation.label: Keep in custody suspense
suspense_continuation.description: There is not enough evidence yet; keep this exact quantity unresolved and blocking.

warnings.manual_review_required: This bridge is authored from your review, not proven by wallet scanning or by the suggestion score.
warnings.weak_advisory_evidence: Amount and timing alone are ambiguous. This hint was not eligible for automatic promotion.
warnings.competing_candidates: Other plausible return groups compete with this explanation. Review them before choosing this bridge.
warnings.unresolved_residual: Some outgoing principal remains in custody suspense and needs a later decision.
warnings.excess_return_unclassified: The return exceeds the outgoing principal. The excess is not carried by this bridge and needs a separate origin classification.

filedImpact.title: Saved or filed report may need amendment
filedImpact.pendingRebuild: Gain and basis changes are not final until journals are rebuilt.

reasons.amount_coverage_high: Most of the outgoing quantity appears in the proposed returns.
reasons.amount_coverage_partial: Part of the outgoing quantity appears in the proposed returns.
reasons.wallet_transition: The source became inactive before the destination wallet became active.
reasons.long_horizon: A plausible return exists despite the long time between wallet boundaries.
reasons.structured_privacy_boundary: A typed privacy-boundary marker supports a missing-wallet interval.
reasons.structured_samourai_wallet: The wallet type identifies a Samourai or Whirlpool policy.
reasons.structured_samourai_transaction: Typed Samourai transaction evidence supports the path.
reasons.structured_samourai_policy: Validated Samourai role and section metadata supports the path.
reasons.structured_custody_chronology: Typed wallet-epoch chronology supports the transition.
reasons.structured_custody_topology: Typed custody topology evidence supports the transition.
reasons.promotion_eligible_structured_signal: Structured evidence and the competitor margin make this a review candidate.
reasons.search_hint_only: Amount and timing alone make this a nonblocking search hint.
reasons.competitor_margin_insufficient: A competing explanation is too close to promote this hint.
reasons.promotion_ineligible_external_origin: Typed commercial evidence indicates an external origin.
reasons.split_source: Several outgoing transactions form the proposed source boundary.
reasons.split_return: Several incoming transactions form the proposed return boundary.
reasons.unresolved_residual: Part of the outgoing quantity remains unexplained.
reasons.return_exceeds_source: The proposed returns exceed the source quantity; the excess needs a separate classification.

empty.title: No known custody gaps
empty.body: Kassiber found no unresolved custody gap in the currently imported evidence. It cannot determine whether wallets that were never imported exist.

processing.title: Custody gap status needs journal processing
processing.body: Process the journal before treating the currently imported evidence as clear.

searchIncomplete.title: Suggestion search reached a capacity limit
searchIncomplete.body: The visible hints may be incomplete. This is an advisory search limitation, not evidence of a disposal and not a tax-report blocker by itself.

blocking.title: Known custody quantity still needs review
blocking.body: {{count}} canonical custody issue blocks final tax basis, even though no current missing-wallet suggestion can resolve it automatically. Review the custody component or quarantine evidence.

unavailable.title: Custody gaps unavailable
unavailable.body: Kassiber could not load the custody-gap snapshot.
